text: As I stand before this display, I feel a curious tension between order and ambiguity. The bright, deliberate colors and precise lettering invite inquiry, yet the tilted angle and reflections in the glass hint at how perception can be easily distorted. The words about confusion and blurred vision on the screen echo in my mind, prompting me to wonder: do I truly see what is presented before me, or am I merely glimpsing a projection shaped by circumstance and angle? I am aware of both the excitement of discovery and the uncertainty of interpretation.
